channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: NBDSA orders Aaj Tak to modify programme over Taj Mahal temple claim segment citing lack of neutrality
item.description: The News Broadcasting and Digital Standards Authority (NBDSA) has directed Aaj Tak to edit or suitably modify portions of a programme hosted by journalist Sudhir Chaudhary, which discussed claims that...

item.title: African Journalists Tour Ukraine and Moldova to Report on War Impacts and Food Security
item.description: A delegation of journalists from seven African countries has completed a study visit to Ukraine and Moldova to gain first-hand understanding of the ongoing effects of the Russia-Ukraine war. The media...

item.title: WHO Director-General discusses Ebola containment efforts in the Democratic Republic of Congo during CNN interview
item.description: CNN’s Clarissa Ward conducted an in-depth interview with Dr. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, the Director-General of the World Health Organization, while aboard a plane traveling over the Democratic Repub...

item.title: Government launches training and oversight to boost loan repayment among women and youth
item.description: Tanzania government don identify say one big problem affecting loan repayment among women and youth be poor financial literacy. To tackle this, dem roll out new programs wey go give beneficiaries prop...

item.title: Toronto police investigate fatal shooting of 27-year-old man near North York home; suspects sought
item.description: Toronto police are investigating a fatal shooting that claimed the life of a 27-year-old man in North York late Friday night. Officers were called to the area of Sheppard Avenue West and Magellan Driv...

item.title: Supreme Court says child’s right to know biological parentage may outweigh privacy in DNA test cases
item.description: The Supreme Court of India has ruled that in certain legal disputes involving paternity, a child’s right to know their biological parentage can outweigh an individual’s right to privacy. The judgment ...

item.title: Coco Gauff exits French Open in third round after tough loss to Potapova
item.description: Coco Gauff, the reigning French Open champion and fourth seed, has ended her title defence at Roland Garros after a tough third-round defeat to Anastasia Potapova. The match was a close three-set batt...

item.title: A clear, non-clickbait headline based on the content
item.description: A rewritten summary (200–500 words) in Australian English highlighting the key points, context, and implications of the article.

item.title: Search ongoing for missing Umhlanga businessman after Hazelmere Dam incident
item.description: The search operation for 54-year-old Umhlanga businessman Tony Govender continues after he went missing at Hazelmere Dam, where he is presumed to have drowned. Govender, a former Navy officer, had bee...

item.title: Long-time volunteer Rosemary Dupont supports Canberra Rape Crisis Centre in governance and community care
item.description: Rosemary Dupont, a long-serving Canberra volunteer, has dedicated almost 50 years to community service and now plays a key governance role at the Canberra Rape Crisis Centre. Her involvement stems fro...

item.title: Comelec to Conduct Plebiscite on Naga City’s Conversion to Highly Urbanized City Status
item.description: The Commission on Elections (Comelec) is expected to organize a plebiscite to determine whether Naga City’s conversion into a Highly Urbanized City (HUC) will be formally ratified. This follows the re...

item.title: Saskatchewan Roughriders release Mario Anderson Jr. and 18 others in final roster cuts
item.description: Mario Anderson Jr. will not be part of the Saskatchewan Roughriders’ roster as they begin their defence of the Grey Cup title. The American running back was one of 19 players released by the club as C...

item.title: Tanzania MPs call for expanded land-use planning and reforms to reduce land disputes
item.description: Members of Parliament in Tanzania have raised concern over the country’s ongoing land conflicts, pointing out that poor land-use planning is the main driver of disputes across many regions. During bud...

item.title: Daily Feng Shui Advice by Master Hanz Cua for May 31, 2026
item.description: On May 31, 2026, Master Hanz Cua, a well-known feng shui expert in the Philippines, shared his daily insights and recommendations based on traditional feng shui principles. These predictions aim to gu...

item.title: Dispute Between Police and Truck Drivers Forum Over N3 Demonstration
item.description: The All Truck Drivers Forum and Allied South Africa (ATDF-SA) has denied involvement in violent disruptions along the N3 near Bergville, following a protest demanding that road freight jobs be reserve...

item.title: Dangote Refinery Lowers Petrol and Diesel Prices to Support Consumers
item.description: Dangote Petroleum Refinery & Petrochemicals don announce say dem don reduce the ex-depot prices of petrol (PMS) and diesel (AGO) again. As e be now, petrol don drop to N1,250 per litre from N1,275, wh...

item.title: Pennsylvania Prepares for Medicaid Work Requirements Amid Administrative and Coverage Concerns
item.description: Pennsylvania is preparing to implement new Medicaid work requirements that will take effect in January 2027 under a federal mandate. State officials say the changes will significantly increase adminis...

item.title: Lebanon urges ceasefire as Israeli strikes escalate in southern regions amid ongoing cross-border clashes
item.description: Lebanon’s Prime Minister Nawaf Salam has strongly criticised Israel’s military actions, accusing it of pursuing a “scorched-earth policy” in southern Lebanon as fresh airstrikes and evacuation warning...

item.title: Behind the scenes of the state visit to Japan: moments from the emperor’s pep talk to handling an unexpected lizard
item.description: This article recounts behind-the-scenes moments from a high-profile state visit to Japan, highlighting lighter, human moments amid official proceedings. It notes the emperor giving a pep talk to prepa...

item.title: Colorado GOP gubernatorial candidate declines to answer question about claims of past killings in interview
item.description: Victor Marx, the Republican frontrunner for Colorado governor, drew attention after refusing to answer a question about how many people he has killed during a televised interview with local news outle...
